item.title: 谁给评分者评分？自我改进法学硕士代理人的共同发展评估指标和技能
item.summary: arXiv:2607.12790v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Self-evolving agent systems improve by creating, revising, and retiring their own skills, but every such loop rests on a hidden assumption: a reliable evaluation metric already exists.
